title: Imperial Symphony Orchestra

{{Quote|The Imperial Symphony Orchestra is preparing to embark on its first tour outside the Core Worlds region in 15 years. The ISO has been engaged for the past five years in a special program promoting Imperial High Culture in the Core.|An Imperial HoloVision announcement|<ref name="Journal" />}}
The '''Imperial Symphony Orchestra''', or the '''ISO''', was the premier [[orchestra]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was comprised of many of the Empire's most talented [[Musician/Legends|musicians]]. From approximately [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]] to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the prestigious group performed exclusively in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], as regions like the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] could not afford to host the orchestra for a variety of reasons. In 0 ABY, about seven [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after an [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Imperial defeat]] in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], the ISO journeyed to the Mid Rim for a series of performances, as firmly established [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] supporters had wiped away all previous impediments.

==History==
{{Quote|Previously, Mid-Rim worlds had been unable or unwilling to submit the substantial sponsorship fees necessary to book the prestigious ISO. Now, with New Order party representatives more securely established in the political fabric of Mid-Rim governments, and with the establishment of all-powerful governorships, many of the ideological and financial obstacles of past decades have been cleared away.|An Imperial HoloVision announcement|<ref name="Journal" />}}
[[File:Palpatine4ABY.png|thumb|right|200px|The ISO often performed music in line with the tastes of Emperor Palpatine.]]
A prestigious [[Music/Legends|musical]] group, the Imperial Symphony Orchestra performed throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] under [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="Journal" /> However, in around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{JournalCite|5|Galaxywide NewsNets}} dates the announcement of the ISO's Mid Rim tour to 35:10:16 in the [[Great ReSynchronization]] dating system, which corresponds to seven [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] or [[0 ABY]] in the [[Galactic Standard Calendar]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. "Galaxywide NewsNets" also establishes the orchestra began playing exclusively in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] fifteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before that [[Time/Legends|time]]—equating to around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]—and dates their participation in an [[High Human Culture/Legends|Imperial High Culture]] program five years before the announcement, corresponding to around [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]].</ref> the orchestra began playing exclusively in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] after [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] could not, or simply refused, to pay the large sponsorship fees that the ISO charged for booking.<ref name="Journal" /> Starting around [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> the [[orchestra]] participated in a five-year-long program dedicated to promoting the ideals of [[High Human Culture/Legends|Imperial High Culture]] within the Core Worlds.<ref name="Journal" /> Much of the music performed by the Orchestra were [[Neoclassical music|Neoclassical]] waltzes and marches, as they were favored by Palpatine.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|97|Imperial Symphony Orchestra (ISO)}}</ref>

By [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], about seven [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Imperial defeat at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="Date" /> situations in the Mid Rim had changed; many Mid Rim worlds had become dominated by pro-[[New Order/Legends|New Order]] regimes or led by strong Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governorships]]. As a result, many obstacles preventing the ISO from touring the region had largely been removed. Via the [[Imperial HoloVision]] news outlet, the Imperial Symphony Orchestra announced its first series of performances outside the Core Worlds in fifteen years. The Mid Rim tour was expected to feature many of the Emperor's favorite Neoclassical pieces, including works from the [[Harbin-re]] [[Harbin-re opera|opera]], some of [[Nabicci Futana]]'s [[Waltz/Legends|waltzes]] and [[ganther dance]]s, and [[March (music)|marches]] dating to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] of nineteen years earlier.<ref name="Journal" /> [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Gaeriel Captison]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] enjoyed the soothing melodies of the ISO's work and listened to a recording of the orchestra one morning<ref name="TAB">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="4 ABY">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref>

==Organization==
The Imperial Symphony Orchestra, the premier group of its kind, drew upon the best [[Musician/Legends|musicians]] that the Empire had to offer.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial Symphony Orchestra was first mentioned in the [[1994]] novel ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'', written by [[Kathy Tyers]].<ref name="TAB" />
